prompt:
A bundle of multicolored jumper wires with pin connectors at each end, loosely coiled on a wooden electronics workbench. Some of the wires are plugged into a nearby breadboard, forming a small temporary circuit that includes a resistor and LED, while the rest of the jumper wires fan out on the table. The metal pins and flexible insulation are clearly visible, emphasizing their use for quick prototyping.

Near-future solarpunk electronics aesthetic with warm, soft lighting, organized tools on a pegboard in the background, and a small plant adding a touch of green. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos or legible text. The composition should clearly highlight the jumper wires as a flexible wiring kit item in the inventory.
